mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (channel_id, external_tx_id, amount, status, transacted_at, created_at) VALUES (#{channelId}, #{externalTxId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{transactedAt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.transaction_id, t.channel_id, t.external_tx_id, t.amount, t.status, t.transacted_at, t.created_at FROM transaction t JOIN channel c ON t.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE c.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY t.transacted_at DESC
SELECT transaction_id, channel_id, external_tx_id, amount, status, transacted_at, created_at FROM transaction WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY transacted_at DESC
